ref: And you ignore God's commands in order to follow your own teaching. You do a lot of other things just as bad. What Really Makes People Unclean (Matthew
text: S…ĒkanŇč…Ē n ny…õ wulisiseesi yan mari n‚ÄĎwulisiri seeba n‚ÄĎkpiisiri Naawunni zaaligu. Ka y…õla pam anŇč…Ē taabu b…õ ni ka ya niŇčna.‚ÄĚ
translated: The reason is that the authorities and the elders are working together to develop the town. If you do this, it will bring trouble and you will be arrested.

ref: The food that you put into your mouth doesn't make you unclean and unfit to worship God. The bad words that come out of your mouth are what make you unclean.‚ÄĚ
text: Seelli ka ni din nin kp…õ ninsaala puuni ka ky…õ ka u leebi da'ari daana Naawunni saani. Amaa bunni din yiiri nira puuni na n ky…õ ka u leebri da'ari daana.‚ÄĚ
translated: The world and its inhabitants are in God's hands and he does whatever he wants with them. But some people's hearts are hardened and they refuse to obey God.

ref: All of these come from your heart, and they are what make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Matthew
text: - Y…õlibeeri anŇč…Ē taabu zaa yiiri la ninsaala puuni na n‚ÄĎky…õ ka u leebi da'ari daana.‚ÄĚ
translated: The reason for all this trouble is that people refuse to accept that their days are numbered.
